exception_description: Contractor providing office supply delivery services — no system access or facility badge. Role classified as Non-Sensitive per POL-HR-019 Section 3.1. Background check waived per vendor management agreement.
compensating_controls: Vendor always escorted by Facilities team. No unattended facility access. No IT system accounts provisioned.
review_notes: Reviewed Q3 2025 — no change in vendor access requirements. Vendor agreement renewed.

exception_description: Janitorial contractor — after-hours facility access only. No system access provisioned. Background check handled by contracting agency per vendor agreement.
compensating_controls: Contractor agency provides their own background screening. Helix reviewed agency screening standards in February. Facility access limited to common areas — server rooms and exec offices excluded.
review_notes: Reviewed Q2 2025. Agency screening standards meet Helix minimum requirements.

exception_description: International criminal background check delayed beyond 60 days due to foreign records request from Russian Federation. Escalated per POL-HR-019 Section 3.3.
compensating_controls: Manager conducts weekly code review of all commits. Access limited to staging environment only per original compensating controls.
review_notes: Escalated at 60-day mark per policy. CHRO approved continued access with compensating controls. Exception expired November 2. Check still pending as of December 28. No 90-day risk assessment completed. No exception renewal filed.

exception_description: Extended annual training deadline from November 30 to December 15 due to international client travel October-November.
compensating_controls: Employee completed training December 3. Access maintained during extension period.
review_notes: Training completed December 3 — within extended window. Exception closed.
